summary.statement: Weekly regression audit after a human-centric homepage revision. Build, robots, and sitemap pass. llms.txt drift (dead /gigs and redirecting /for/brands) was found and remediated this run. State pointer was stale and IndexNow support was missing; both addressed. Homepage claim edits trace to product truth and were recorded. GSC/analytics remain blocked (no credentials).

metrics.name: gsc_indexation
metrics.source: blocked: no Google Search Console credentials
limitations: No GSC service account configured; indexation not verifiable

notes: sitemap.ts uses new Date() for lastModified on every build; acceptable but not per-URL truthful lastmod.
site-profile.yaml launch.initialUrlInventory still lists aspirational /for/brands, /gigs, /developers not served on this reps-only site.

metrics.name: llms_txt_live_url_accuracy
metrics.source: curl HEAD checks against localhost:3000 after fix

notes: llms.txt Key URLs now list only live/canonical pages (/, /for/reps, /pricing, /guides, /terms, /privacy, /sitemap.xml, /robots.txt).
New homepage 'Fair & transparent' copy asserts escrow-funded, verified, no-cap and $0-to-join claims consistent with llms.txt and product source.
Homepage claims ($0 to join / free for reps, no earning cap, escrow funded up front, verified results) trace to ev-llms-product and ev-platform-fees.
Prompt benchmark and citation sampling remain experimental (quarterly cadence).

evidence: next build: 26/26 static pages generated, exit 0
sitemap.ts includes hub + 12 GUIDE_SLUGS + core marketing; prior audit missingGuideUrls: []

checks.reason: Dead /gigs (404) and redirecting /for/brands (307) removed from Key URLs this run.
evidence: public/llms.txt updated to live URLs only
grep of src/app and src/lib for /gigs and /for/brands hrefs: no matches
src/lib/home-faq.ts consumed by page.tsx; unchanged this run
Homepage trust-section claims recorded in content-home.json against ev-llms-product, ev-platform-fees

checks.reason: No Google Search Console credentials configured.

findings.title: llms.txt listed URLs that 404 or redirect
findings.observed: public/llms.txt Key URLs listed https://coldcallreps.com/gigs (returns 404) and https://coldcallreps.com/for/brands (returns 307 redirect) on a reps-recruiting-only site.
competingHypotheses: Intentional forward-reference to future brand/gig surfaces
Copied from a fuller marketplace profile that spans marketpounce.com
findings.remediation: Removed /gigs and /for/brands from Key URLs; added /guides. Applied in this run.
findings.validation: curl of remaining llms.txt Key URLs returns 200 (or intentional redirect for /sign-up).

findings.title: state/latest.json never updated after prior run
findings.observed: docs/site-ops/state/latest.json had lastRunId: null and publishedGuideUrls: [] despite a 2026-07-16 sitemap audit and 13 live guides.
competingHypotheses: Prior run emitted a report but skipped SOP step 8
findings.remediation: Updated state pointer with lastRunId, completedAt, next cadence dates, and publishedGuideUrls. Applied in this run.
findings.validation: state/latest.json lastRunId matches this run id and publishedGuideUrls has 13 entries.

findings.title: IndexNow submission script and key not implemented
findings.observed: search-indexing.md sections 3-4 require scripts/submit-indexnow.ts and a public key file; neither existed, and no seo:* package scripts were present.
competingHypotheses: Only the Google sitemap audit half was implemented previously
findings.remediation: Added scripts/submit-indexnow.ts (dry-run default, HTTPS+host+robots validation), public IndexNow key file, and seo:audit-sitemap / seo:indexnow package scripts. Applied in this run.
findings.validation: npx tsx scripts/submit-indexnow.ts prints dry-run URL list without POSTing.
findings.rollback: Remove scripts/submit-indexnow.ts, key file, and package script entries

findings.title: Homepage revision shipped outside content mode
findings.observed: Human-centric homepage images, a new 'Fair & transparent' section, and proof-bar copy changes were made without a content brief, evidence check, content record, or report.
competingHypotheses: Fast iterative design pass preceding formal recording
findings.remediation: Created content-records/content-home.json this run; verified new claims trace to product truth (no fabricated metrics).
findings.validation: content-home.json publicationGate all pass; claims present in llms.txt/product source.

blockedChecks.reason: No Google Search Console credentials configured for coldcallreps.com.
